entries.title: Activist investor Elliott builds 3% stake in Consumer Corp, pushes for break-up
entries.summary: Hedge fund Elliott Management is pressing Consumer Corp to spin off its European unit and explore strategic alternatives, according to a 13D filing.

entries.title: Consumer Corp CEO announces strategic review of non-core assets
entries.summary: On its Q1 call, Consumer Corp said it is undertaking a strategic review to explore options for its Agricultural Chemicals segment, which has underperformed for three years.

entries.title: Industrial Inc faces refinancing wall as $4bn in debt matures in 2025
entries.summary: Industrial Inc's management acknowledged covenant headroom tightening on its earnings call and hinted at portfolio rationalisation.

entries.title: Moody's places Industrial Inc on rating watch negative
entries.summary: Citing refinancing risk and segment underperformance, Moody's downgrade watch follows a peer divestment by rival Chemicals PLC.

entries.title: Chemicals PLC divests specialty chemicals arm for $1.2bn
entries.summary: Peer transaction sets valuation precedent for comparable carve-outs in the sector.

entries.title: New CFO appointed at Tech Giant after strategic shake-up
entries.summary: The new chief financial officer signals a pivot toward capital discipline and potential divestments.

entries.title: Retail Co CEO appointed to lead turnaround amid activist pressure
entries.summary: New CEO to explore strategic alternatives including store-portfolio rationalisation and possible sale.
